attributes.additional_details:
The BBC is a service and its illegal to force people to pay for a service they don't want for example you don't pay a phone provider if you don't want that service you don't pay for a car service or road tax if you don't have a car.
You ONLY pay for any service if you WANT that service and that's what the BBC is a SERVICE which many people simply don't want
attributes.background: Make it so only those who want a TV pay the fee.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Rename ‘BBC licence fee’ to ‘BBC subscription’
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750806
